iterations.title: Exponential decay of var_inc
iterations.reason: Gradually reducing var_inc over time prevents activity scores from growing too large and improves long-term stability.

implementations.title: Exponential decay of var_inc
implementations.reason: Gradually reducing var_inc over time prevents activity scores from growing too large and improves long-term stability.

implementations.title: Perturbation on restart phases
implementations.reason: Adding a small random flip to saved phases after restart increases exploration and helps escape local optima.

implementations.title: Reset local_best on rephase
implementations.reason: Resetting local_best to current saved phases ensures the rephase starts from a fresh best phase, improving adaptability.

implementations.title: Additional LBD-based restart trigger
implementations.reason: Adding a second condition based on absolute LBD ratio helps restart more aggressively when recent clauses are poor quality.

implementations.title: Progress-based rephase trigger
implementations.reason: Adding a condition based on trail size relative to threshold triggers rephase when the solver is stuck, improving search diversity.

iterations.title: Exponential decay of var_inc
iterations.reason: Gradually reduce var_inc over time to prevent VSIDS from becoming too aggressive and to encourage exploration later in search.

implementations.title: Exponential decay of var_inc
implementations.reason: Gradually reduce var_inc over time to prevent VSIDS from becoming too aggressive and to encourage exploration later in search.

implementations.title: Adjusted rephase probabilities
implementations.reason: Increase chance of using local_best (50%) and decrease random phases to focus more on promising assignments.

implementations.code: rephases = 0, threshold *= 0.95, rephase_limit += 4096;
implementations.title: Slower threshold decay and smaller rephase limit increment
implementations.reason: More conservative rephase to allow longer phases and reduce oscillation.

implementations.code: else if (lbd_queue_size == 50 && 0.9 * fast_lbd_sum / lbd_queue_size > slow_lbd_sum / conflicts) restart();
implementations.title: Tighter restart condition
implementations.reason: Increase the multiplier from 0.8 to 0.9 to make restarts slightly less frequent, allowing more exploration before restarting.

implementations.code: else if (rephases >= rephase_limit && conflicts > 10000) rephase();
implementations.title: Delay rephase until after initial search
implementations.reason: Avoid rephasing too early when the solver is still building a good phase, improving stability.

iterations.title: Adaptive var_inc decay with conflict frequency
iterations.reason: Decaying var_inc every 500 conflicts reduces VSIDS aggressiveness over time, promoting exploration and preventing premature convergence.
